step1.title: Log in or Sign up
step1.text: Create a parent account to start renting toys.

step2.title: Find the right toy
step2.text: Browse toys by name, category, and age range.

step3.title: Choose dates
step3.text: Pick rental dates and check availability instantly.

step4.title: Send a request
step4.text: Send a rental request to the owner in a few clicks.

step5.title: Pick up & play
step5.text: Meet the owner, collect the toy, and let your child enjoy.

step6.title: Return on time
step6.text: Return the toy clean and on time, then rent the next one.

step1.title: List your toy
step1.text: Add photos, age range, condition, and a daily price in minutes.

step2.title: Receive rental requests
step2.text: Parents discover your toy and send rental requests.

step3.title: Approve a request
step3.text: Accept the dates that work for your family.

step4.title: Hand over the toy
step4.text: Meet the renter and hand over the toy clean and safe.

step5.title: Get the toy back
step5.text: Get the toy returned on the agreed date.

step6.title: Repeat
step6.text: List more toys your child has outgrown and keep them in use.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.helpText: Send us an email and we’ll get back to you as soon as possible.

q1.question: How does renting a toy work?
q1.answer: Find a toy your child will love, pick rental dates, send a request, and meet the owner to pick it up. Return it clean and on time.

q2.question: Is it safe to rent toys from other families?
q2.answer: Owners share photos, condition, and hygiene notes. Every booking goes through the owner so you always know who you are renting from.

q3.question: How are toys cleaned between rentals?
q3.answer: Owners describe how each toy is cleaned in the listing. Many also charge a small refundable deposit to cover damage or excessive wear.

q4.question: What if my child loses a part of the toy?
q4.answer: Report it to the owner as soon as possible. If a deposit was set, it can be used to cover damage or replacement.

q5.question: Can I cancel a rental?
q5.answer: You can cancel a pending rental request at any time. Once approved, cancellation depends on the owner’s policy.

q6.question: What do I need to list a toy?
q6.answer: Create an account, add at least one clear photo, choose a toy category, add a description and a daily price. Optionally add an age range and a refundable deposit.

validation.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.

protection.title: Rental Deposit & Coverage
protection.intro: Some owners ask for a small refundable deposit — the amount and refund terms are set by each owner.
protection.bullet1: The deposit can be used to cover damage, missing parts, or excessive wear
protection.bullet2: The deposit is fully refunded when the toy is returned in the agreed condition
protection.bullet3: Each owner describes how the toy is cleaned between rentals
protection.bullet4: Please follow the owner's age and safety guidance
protection.bullet5: If an issue comes up, contact the owner first — ToyRent support is also here to help.

details.ownerCardSubtitle: Locked phone before booking, revealed after.
details.contactLabelPre: Owner phone number will be available
details.contactLabelBold: after you send a booking request.

createPage.title: List a Toy
createPage.subtitle: Share toys your child has outgrown and let other families rent them.
createPage.adminReviewNotice: Your listing will be reviewed by our team before it becomes visible to other parents.
createPage.successMessage: Your toy publication is under review. We'll inform you by email once it is approved.
createPage.imageUploadWarning: Your toy was listed, but the photo upload failed. You can add photos later from My Toys.

tips.title: Tips for a great listing
tips.realPhotos: Use real, clear photos — they build trust with parents.
tips.missingPieces: Mention if any parts are missing or worn out.
tips.hygiene: Describe how you clean the toy between rentals.
tips.fairPrice: Set a fair daily price to attract more families.
tips.adminApproval: Your listing goes live only after our team approves it.

wizard.step1Hint: Bright daylight, clean background, all parts visible.
wizard.step2Hint: The clearer the basics, the faster you’ll get a renter.

wizard.step4Hint: Parents look here before booking. Be honest.
wizard.step5Hint: Goes live within 4 hours after we review.
wizard.submitNote: Once submitted, our team will review your listing and get back to you within 24–48 hours.
